messages.text: What is the plan for Sharan?

Maybe we could have a few minutes to discuss. I think Sharan is an ideal candidate to be the future lab manager for SoyLei but he lacks the lab experience and management tools/experience. If Sharan came to ISU for 12-24 months, we can train him and then transition him back to SoyLei at the time that works best for Soylei. Need to also discuss the pellet at NCAT.
With the changes made, we probably go sideways for 12 months…while an agree Sharan on a keeper, thought I heard he was going to pursue a PhD…
